name: Viking Mines Limited
summary: Viking Mines Limited explores for, develops, and mines mineral deposits in West Africa. The company explores for gold and coal deposits. It holds 100% interests in the Tumentu Gold Project and Butre Gold Project located in Ghana; and Berkh Uul Coal Project and Khonkhor Zag Coal project located in Mongolia. The company was formerly known as Viking Ashanti Limited. Viking Mines Limited was founded in 2007 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
